name: readsb
description: ADS-B Mode S/Mode AC decoder and feed server. Receives 1090 MHz signals from aircraft transponders and provides Beast, SBS, and JSON output for visualization and feeding.

name: acarsdec
description: Multi-channel ACARS decoder. Receives VHF ACARS messages on frequencies around 130-136 MHz and outputs decoded text messages from aircraft.

name: dumpvdl2
description: VDL Mode 2 decoder. Receives VHF Data Link Mode 2 messages used for ACARS-over-AVLC digital datalink communications between aircraft and ground stations.

name: dumphfdl
description: HFDL decoder. Receives High Frequency Data Link messages used for long-range oceanic aircraft communications on HF bands (2-22 MHz).

name: vdlm2dec
description: Alternative VDL Mode 2 decoder. Lightweight VDL2 decoder that can monitor multiple frequencies simultaneously.

name: AIS-Catcher
description: AIS receiver and decoder. Captures Automatic Identification System signals from ships and maritime vessels on 161.975 and 162.025 MHz.

name: rtl_airband
description: Multi-channel AM/FM demodulator for airband frequencies. Streams audio from aviation voice channels including Tower, Ground, Approach, and Departure.

name: rtl_433
description: Generic data receiver for ISM band devices. Decodes weather stations, tire pressure sensors, doorbells, and hundreds of other 433/868/915 MHz devices.

name: SatDump
description: Satellite data processing suite. Decodes weather satellite imagery and data from NOAA, Meteor-M, GOES, Himawari, and other satellites.

name: ACARS Hub
description: Web-based ACARS message viewer and aggregator. Displays decoded ACARS, VDL2, and HFDL messages in a searchable web interface with statistics.

name: tar1090
description: Web-based aircraft tracking map. Displays real-time aircraft positions from ADS-B data on an interactive map with history trails.

name: graphs1090
description: ADS-B performance graphs and statistics. Provides long-term tracking of aircraft count, message rate, signal levels, and coverage metrics.
